data.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Read all target files and tests. Changes needed: (1) red-task-escalation.md: remove EPIC_ID line (PRIMARY_TICKET_ID already present); (2) ci-failure-validation-state.md: update path + epicId references to primaryTicketId; (3) epic-complexity-evaluator.md: update title; (4) SKILL.md: migrate EPIC_ID context envelope line ✓
